chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.D-18 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For katcha peshi. 2. For hearing of MA No.299 / 2017. 11-01-2018 Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro Additional A.G. Sindh along with ASI Muhammad Iqbal Jatt PS Jhol. Syed Meeral Shah Additional Prosecutor General Sindh. It is second call. None present on behalf of the petitioners. No intimation received till 11.20 a.m. Learned A.A.G. has drawn the attention of this Court towards the statement of respondent No.4 available on record showing that parties have patched up their dispute outside the Court, therefore, in view of statement of respondent No.4, this petition has become infructuous and accordingly, the same is dismissed along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
